A_percentile.reason: Monotone transform doesn't change Spearman rank correlation

B_dual_mode.reason: AGQ-track PCA/LVR too insensitive for small refactorings

C_count_based.reason: Absolute counts slightly better within-repo, no help cross-repo

D_behavioral.reason: Git activity metrics uncorrelated with architecture quality

key_finding: No single metric or normalization resolves the cross-repo vs within-repo tension

recommendation.within_repo_tracking: Component-level dashboard: M, PCA, violation counts
recommendation.abandon: Single unified formula for both use cases
